"
generate_data.py
-----------------
Creates two synthetic CSV files so the whole TuneFinder project runs
end-to-end WITHOUT needing to download anything from Kaggle/Spotify:

  1. songs.csv    -> song catalogue with audio features (content-based filtering)
  2. ratings.csv  -> synthetic user listening history (collaborative filtering)

If you want to use REAL data instead, just replace songs.csv with the
Kaggle Spotify Dataset" (keep the same column names) and ratings.csv
with a real user-song interaction log.

"
